issues: RACE CONDITION (low severity): generateRecurringTransactionsEagerly() and loadTransactions() launch as separate coroutines - brief window where list may be stale before Room re-emits. Self-healing via Room invalidation tracker.
NO COMPOSITE INDEX on (recurring_id, date) for countByRecurringAndDate query. Works but less efficient.
suggestions: Add composite index on TransactionEntity for (recurring_id, date).
Consider awaiting eager generation before subscribing to transaction Flow.
Inject Clock for unit testability of date-dependent logic.
Add retry limit to WorkManager worker to avoid infinite silent retries.
